---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. For non-trivial features, note
whether this warrants a spec (`specs/TEMPLATE.spec.md`) — see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you prefer the proposal.

## Additional context

Links, references, or prior art (e.g. `docs/related-work.md`).
